calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Continued To Feb-01-16 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, November 5, 2015, in Department 525:
Michele Scott, Esq.(415) 956-8100, counsel for Respondent/Plaintiff Brendan Quinlan who is also present.
Eric H. Milliken, Esq.,(415) 341-2888, Specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant Louis Dorsey who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Counsel Ms. Scott states the overviews of the cases on behalf of Mr. Quinlan and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Group Exhibit (A) - Est. cost, work proposal, 11/19/2014 letter to Mr. Quinlan, 11/26/2014 letter to Louis, pictures, etc.

Mr. Quinlan testifies on his own behalf and testifies on the exhibits under direct examination of Counsel Ms. Scott.

Counsel Milliken testifies on behalf of Mr. Dorsey and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Group Exhibit (1) - declaration of Mike Alioto, inspection, pictures, invoices, etc.

Mr. Dorsey testifies under direct examination of Counsel Mr. Milliken.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Judgment Entered
